title: AI Systems Engineer: 16-Week Path
subtitle: Build context-aware agents, reliable distributed workflows, and measured retrieval/recommendation systems.

weeks.title: Context inventory and evaluation
weeks.goal: Make every context source, owner, permission, freshness rule, and token cost visible.
weeks.deliverable: Context map plus 30–50 golden conversations covering long threads, stale facts, conflicts, injection, and permissions.

weeks.title: LangGraph persistence and replay
weeks.goal: Understand state, threads, checkpoints, interrupts, replay, and safe graph resumption.
weeks.deliverable: Restart/resume tests at graph boundaries and a state-schema versioning note.

weeks.title: Safe side effects and agent boundaries
weeks.goal: Separate model decisions, runtime context, domain writes, approvals, and idempotency keys.
weeks.deliverable: Effect ledger and tests proving a replay cannot duplicate a user-visible write.

weeks.title: Tracing and eval gates
weeks.goal: Make traces, graders, cost, latency, and regressions part of the development loop.
weeks.deliverable: Trace schema, context budget ledger, task graders, and a release threshold.

weeks.title: Framework comparison
weeks.goal: Learn the concepts that transfer across LangGraph, LangChain, ADK, Pydantic AI, and OpenAI Agents.
weeks.deliverable: One small approval workflow implemented in two runtimes and compared by measured trade-offs.

weeks.title: Kafka correctness
weeks.goal: Understand partitions, consumer groups, offsets, retries, DLQs, replay, lag, and backpressure.
weeks.deliverable: Crash matrix proving the intended delivery semantics for one consumer workflow.

weeks.title: Postgres, Redis, and transactional boundaries
weeks.goal: Use transactions, constraints, outbox/inbox patterns, leases, fencing, and cache invalidation deliberately.
weeks.deliverable: Transactional deduplication plus Redis lock/lease failure tests.

weeks.title: Temporal durable execution
weeks.goal: Make long-lived workflows recoverable across process death, retries, deploys, and timeouts.
weeks.deliverable: One durable workflow with activity idempotence, retry policy, timeout policy, and recovery demo.

weeks.title: Recommendation data contracts
weeks.goal: Separate exposure, outcome, negative feedback, delayed labels, and point-in-time features.
weeks.deliverable: Exposure/outcome schema, leakage tests, retention rules, and a reproducible dataset.

weeks.title: Candidate generation
weeks.goal: Build multiple candidate sources and measure per-source recall, freshness, and latency.
weeks.deliverable: Popularity/rules plus vector or two-tower retrieval baseline with recall@k.

weeks.title: Ranking and reranking
weeks.goal: Separate learned relevance from diversity, freshness, safety, policy, and user controls.
weeks.deliverable: Ranker plus explicit policy reranker with offline slices and latency budget.

weeks.title: Freshness and online learning
weeks.goal: Understand non-stationary signals, embedding updates, delayed feedback, and index refresh.
weeks.deliverable: Freshness experiment with feature/index versioning and backfill behavior.

weeks.title: Generative recommendation frontier
weeks.goal: Understand when generative retrieval is useful and when a two-stage baseline remains better.
weeks.deliverable: Comparison note: ANN/two-tower baseline versus semantic-ID or sequential generative retrieval.

weeks.title: Fault injection and operations
weeks.goal: Practice dependency failure, throttling, stale reads, duplicate events, partial writes, and shutdown.
weeks.deliverable: Fault-injection report with SLO impact, rollback, reconciliation, and runbook updates.

weeks.title: Integrated production slice
weeks.goal: Connect context-aware agents, reliable events, retrieval, recommendation candidates, traces, and evals.
weeks.deliverable: One end-to-end slice with golden tests, traces, cost/latency dashboard, and safe rollout plan.

weeks.title: Staff-level package
weeks.goal: Turn the work into evidence of technical leadership and system ownership.
weeks.deliverable: Design doc, threat model, capacity model, SLOs, rollout plan, incident drill, and retrospective.
